questions.question: Identify the word class of the word 'running' in the sentence 'She is running'.
questions.hint: What is the part of speech of the given word?

questions.question: Which of the following words is an adjective in the sentence 'The big house is on the hill'? Choose one.
What is the word class of the word 'unhappiness' in the sentence 'The feeling of unhappiness is unbearable'.
questions.hint: What type of word is 'unhappiness' in the given sentence?
